description: WideWorldImporters daily inventory ETL: extract StockItems, Holdings, Transactions and Suppliers, produce inventory valuation, slow-mover analysis and supplier performance tables in TargetDB.

source.query: SELECT si.StockItemID, si.StockItemName, si.SupplierID, si.UnitPrice, si.RecommendedRetailPrice, si.TaxRate, si.LeadTimeDays, si.QuantityPerOuter, si.IsChillerStock, si.Barcode, si.Size, si.Brand, si.MarketingComments FROM Warehouse.StockItems si WHERE si.ValidTo = '9999-12-31 23:59:59.9999999'

tasks.sql: SELECT StockItemID, StockItemName, SupplierID, MarketingComments, 'success' as status FROM extract_stock_items.raw_stock_items LIMIT 100

tasks.message: wwi_inventory_etl completed — InventoryValuation, SlowMovingStock, SupplierPerformance refreshed.
